title: meta-axiom

options.label: P1
options.author: mistral:7b
options.text: "CLARITY AND EFFICIENCY: A construct should be designed to not only be machine-interpretable and testable, but also easy for humans to understand and efficient in terms of resource usage."

options.label: P2
options.author: llama3:latest
options.text: Any new feature or construct must be demonstrated to significantly improve the expressiveness, readability, or maintainability of programs, and its benefits must outweigh any added complexity or cognitive load.

options.label: P3
options.author: gemma4:latest
options.text: All side effects and state mutations must be strictly local and explicitly defined by the type system.

options.label: P4
options.author: qwen3:8b
options.text: EVERY FEATURE MUST BE EXPRESSIBLE IN TERMS OF THE CORE PRIMITIVES WITHOUT ADDITIONAL SYNTAX OR SEMANTIC RULES.

options.label: P5
options.author: deepseek-r1:8b
options.text: Prioritize safety from unintended effects over expressive power.

winner_text: EVERY FEATURE MUST BE EXPRESSIBLE IN TERMS OF THE CORE PRIMITIVES WITHOUT ADDITIONAL SYNTAX OR SEMANTIC RULES.
